Hey guys good afternoon🥰

I’m back with more @EclipseFND vibes –  did you know they have a Genesis NFT Collection with a floor price of 0.479 ETH atm?
Yes , its @asclubnft - a group of people who share a passion for learning,creativity, fun, supporting each other &  who believe every day in @Eclipse 🥹
I think the art is Really cute & I will try my best to buy one! Wanna join them im sure this is the community for me🥰 NFA

Shoutout to @Alucard_eth and all the team!💚

I will be back with more info about Eclipse soon, kiss✨️

result.text:
I’m back with more info about @EclipseFND the Layer 2 that’s been blowing my mind lately. I’ve been making some research for a while now, and I’m excited to share some fresh updates - especially what’s new in 2025!👇🧵

This year, Eclipse has kicked things up a notch. They’ve hit a mind-blowing 10 billion transactions in just few months, overtaking Sui Network to become the blockchain with the most transactions ever.

They rolled out an update for custom rollups that’s making it even more flexible for developers. Imagine tailored solutions for DeFi, gaming or whatever wild ideas come next! 
They’ve also launched cool features like data staking with Relic DAO, letting users “stake their data and own their destiny” - a fresh take on engagement imo.

Oh, and have you heard about the Eclipse Moo Games? The Eclipse Moo Games were a series of on-chain games organized in collaboration with @rektech. The event took place from February 3 to 6 and saw the participation of over 11,000 players, making it one of the largest blockchain gaming experiments of the year. 

The concept was simple yet brilliant: 4 games, 4 days & a prize pool that grew with the number of participants - by the end, we’re talking about over $400,000 in prizes distributed!🥹 The community is still raving about it - definitely a sign of more fun to come.

I’m hooked, and I’ll keep you posted with more soon! 💚 Kiss
